next_experiment: Replace finite tree completion by an ordinal or rank argument that permits unbounded adaptive prefix depth for every natural code.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: This is a no-go theorem for finite or bounded-depth cover proofs, not a divergent natural orbit. It neither constructs a Collatz counterexample nor excludes an unbounded well-founded contracting cover.
